languages.text: "В первую очередь, смею вас предупредить, что пока реликвия, питающая Сектор Бионика чудотворным знанием Омниссии, не исцелена... к моей глубокой скорби, установка священных имплантов невозможна". {n}При всей витиеватости речи, свойственной скорее дворянину, нежели хирургеону, Мартинакс говорит с неподдельным сожалением.{/n}

"Firstly, I must boldly warn you that, until the relic that powers the Sector Bionica with the miraculous knowledge of the Omnissiah is healed... to my deepest sorrow, the installation of sacred implants cannot be performed." {n}For all his florid speech — more typical of a noble than a chirurgeon — Martinax speaks with genuine sadness.{/n}
languages.original_text: "В первую очередь, смею вас предупредить, что пока реликвия, питающая Сектор Бионика чудотворным знанием Омниссии, не исцелена... к моей глубокой скорби, установка священных имплантов невозможна". {n}При всей витиеватости речи, свойственной скорее дворянину, нежели хирургеону, Мартинакс говорит с неподдельным сожалением.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Firstly, I must boldly warn you that, until the relic that powers the Sector Bionica with the miraculous knowledge of the Omnissiah is healed... to my deepest sorrow, the installation of sacred implants cannot be performed." {n}For all his florid speech — more typical of a noble than a chirurgeon — Martinax speaks with genuine sadness.{/n}

"Firstly, I must boldly warn you that, until the relic that powers the Sector Bionica with the miraculous knowledge of the Omnissiah is healed... to my deepest sorrow, the installation of sacred implants cannot be performed." {n}For all his florid speech — more typical of a noble than a chirurgeon — Martinax speaks with genuine sadness.{/n}

"Firstly, I must boldly warn you that, until the relic that powers the Sector Bionica with the miraculous knowledge of the Omnissiah is healed... to my deepest sorrow, the installation of sacred implants cannot be performed." {n}For all his florid speech — more typical of a noble than a chirurgeon — Martinax speaks with genuine sadness.{/n}

languages.text: “首先，请容我冒昧提醒您，在那台以欧姆尼赛亚的奇迹知识驱动仿生区的圣物痊愈之前，我们无法进行神圣植入物的安装，这令我无比悲痛。”{n}尽管马丁纳克斯的措辞华丽得像是贵族而非船医，他的悲伤却是发自内心的。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Firstly, I must boldly warn you that, until the relic that powers the Sector Bionica with the miraculous knowledge of the Omnissiah is healed... to my deepest sorrow, the installation of sacred implants cannot be performed." {n}For all his florid speech — more typical of a noble than a chirurgeon — Martinax speaks with genuine sadness.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “首先，请容我冒昧提醒您，在那台以欧姆尼赛亚的奇迹知识驱动仿生区的圣物痊愈之前，我们无法进行神圣植入物的安装，这令我无比悲痛。”{n}尽管马丁纳克斯的措辞华丽得像是贵族而非船医，他的悲伤却是发自内心的。{/n}

languages.text: «En primer lugar, y si me permite la osadía, le advierto que mientras no sane la reliquia que otorga al Sector Bionica los milagrosos conocimientos del Omnissiah... muy a mi pesar no podrá llevarse a cabo la instalación de más implantes sagrados». {n}A pesar de su rimbombante dialéctica, más propia de un aristócrata que de un quirurgo, Martinax parece genuinamente consternado.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Firstly, I must boldly warn you that, until the relic that powers the Sector Bionica with the miraculous knowledge of the Omnissiah is healed... to my deepest sorrow, the installation of sacred implants cannot be performed." {n}For all his florid speech — more typical of a noble than a chirurgeon — Martinax speaks with genuine sadness.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «En primer lugar, y si me permite la osadía, le advierto que mientras no sane la reliquia que otorga al Sector Bionica los milagrosos conocimientos del Omnissiah... muy a mi pesar no podrá llevarse a cabo la instalación de más implantes sagrados». {n}A pesar de su rimbombante dialéctica, más propia de un aristócrata que de un quirurgo, Martinax parece genuinamente consternado.{/n}

languages.text: « Tout d'abord, je suis au regret de vous informer d'une chose : tant que la relique qui alimente le secteur Bionica grâce au savoir miraculeux de l'Omnimessie ne sera pas guérie... la pose d'implants sacrés restera impossible. » {n}Derrière son discours pompeux, plus adapté à un noble qu'à un chirurgeon, Martinax semble réellement peiné.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Firstly, I must boldly warn you that, until the relic that powers the Sector Bionica with the miraculous knowledge of the Omnissiah is healed... to my deepest sorrow, the installation of sacred implants cannot be performed." {n}For all his florid speech — more typical of a noble than a chirurgeon — Martinax speaks with genuine sadness.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Tout d'abord, je suis au regret de vous informer d'une chose : tant que la relique qui alimente le secteur Bionica grâce au savoir miraculeux de l'Omnimessie ne sera pas guérie... la pose d'implants sacrés restera impossible. » {n}Derrière son discours pompeux, plus adapté à un noble qu'à un chirurgeon, Martinax semble réellement peiné.{/n}

languages.text: "Zuerst muss ich Euch eindringlich warnen, dass bis zur Heilung des Reliktes, das den Sektor Bionica mit dem wundersamen Wissen des Omnissiah betreibt ... zu meinem größten Bedauern keine Installation heiliger Implantate möglich ist." {n}Trotz seiner blumigen Worte — die eher einem Adeligen als einem Chirurgeum gleichen — spricht Martinax mit großer Traurigkeit.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Firstly, I must boldly warn you that, until the relic that powers the Sector Bionica with the miraculous knowledge of the Omnissiah is healed... to my deepest sorrow, the installation of sacred implants cannot be performed." {n}For all his florid speech — more typical of a noble than a chirurgeon — Martinax speaks with genuine sadness.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Zuerst muss ich Euch eindringlich warnen, dass bis zur Heilung des Reliktes, das den Sektor Bionica mit dem wundersamen Wissen des Omnissiah betreibt ... zu meinem größten Bedauern keine Installation heiliger Implantate möglich ist." {n}Trotz seiner blumigen Worte — die eher einem Adeligen als einem Chirurgeum gleichen — spricht Martinax mit großer Traurigkeit.{/n}

languages.text: "Öncelikle sizi cesaretle uyarmalıyım. Sektör Biyonika'ya Hermesih'in mucizevi irfanını bahşeden yadigâr iyileşene kadar... En derin üzüntümle söylüyorum ki kutsal implantların takılma işlemleri gerçekleştirilemez." {n}Bir cerrahtan ziyade bir soyluya yaraşan o şatafatlı konuşmasına rağmen Martinax, samimi bir üzüntüyle konuşuyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Firstly, I must boldly warn you that, until the relic that powers the Sector Bionica with the miraculous knowledge of the Omnissiah is healed... to my deepest sorrow, the installation of sacred implants cannot be performed." {n}For all his florid speech — more typical of a noble than a chirurgeon — Martinax speaks with genuine sadness.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Öncelikle sizi cesaretle uyarmalıyım. Sektör Biyonika'ya Hermesih'in mucizevi irfanını bahşeden yadigâr iyileşene kadar... En derin üzüntümle söylüyorum ki kutsal implantların takılma işlemleri gerçekleştirilemez." {n}Bir cerrahtan ziyade bir soyluya yaraşan o şatafatlı konuşmasına rağmen Martinax, samimi bir üzüntüyle konuşuyor.{/n}

languages.text: 「まず、大胆に警告しますが、オムニシアスの奇跡的な知識でセクター・ビオニカを動かす遺物まで治癒されるまでは…深く悲しむことながら、聖なるインプラントの装着はできません。」{n}華麗な言葉で話すマーティナックスは、貴族らしい言葉遣いである。しかし、彼の言葉には真の悲しみがある。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Firstly, I must boldly warn you that, until the relic that powers the Sector Bionica with the miraculous knowledge of the Omnissiah is healed... to my deepest sorrow, the installation of sacred implants cannot be performed." {n}For all his florid speech — more typical of a noble than a chirurgeon — Martinax speaks with genuine sadness.{/n}
